chunks.title: Philistine and Israelite Camps
chunks.reason: Sets the scene for the narrative with troop movements.

chunks.title: Philistine Commanders Question David
chunks.reason: Contains the commanders' inquiry and Achish's defense of David.

chunks.title: Achish Sends David Away
chunks.reason: Achish explains the decision to David and gives instructions.

chunks.title: David Returns to Ziklag
chunks.reason: Describes the execution of the plan and the movement of armies.
